languages.text: "Два рукоположенных служителя Омниссии могут выяснить свои отношения сами".
"Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."
languages.original_text: "Два рукоположенных служителя Омниссии могут выяснить свои отношения сами".

traits.locale_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."
"Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."
"Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."
"Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

languages.text: «Dos sirvientes ordenados del Omnissiah pueden resolver sus diferencias entre ellos».
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: «Dos sirvientes ordenados del Omnissiah pueden resolver sus diferencias entre ellos».

languages.text: « Deux serviteurs ordonnés de l'Omnimessie devraient pouvoir régler leurs différends entre eux. »
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: « Deux serviteurs ordonnés de l'Omnimessie devraient pouvoir régler leurs différends entre eux. »

languages.text: “两名受祝的欧姆尼赛亚仆从当能自行解决分歧。”
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: “两名受祝的欧姆尼赛亚仆从当能自行解决分歧。”

languages.text: "Zwei geweihte Diener des Omnissiah können ihre Differenzen selbst beilegen."
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: Zwei geweihte Diener des Omnissiah können ihre Differenzen selbst beilegen.

languages.text: "Hermesih'in vazifelendirilmiş iki hizmetkârı, anlaşmazlıklarını kendileri çözebilir."
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: "Hermesih'in vazifelendirilmiş iki hizmetkârı, anlaşmazlıklarını kendileri çözebilir."

languages.text: 「オムニッシアに叙任された者が二人もいるなら、自分たちの相違は自分たちで解決できるだろう」
languages.original_text: "Two ordained servants of the Omnissiah can resolve their differences themselves."

traits.locale_text: 「オムニッシアに叙任された者が二人もいるなら、自分たちの相違は自分たちで解決できるだろう」
